title: S + V + except that / except for + N

formulas.formula: S + V + except that + S + V
formulas.zh: 主語＋動詞＋除了……之外（後接子句）
主語＋動詞＋除了……之外（後接名詞）

explanation: except that 與 except for 均表達「除了……之外」的例外情況。except that 後接完整子句（含主語與動詞），用於說明某個具體狀況；except for 後接名詞或名詞片語，用於指出某個事物或要素。兩者不可互換。需特別注意與 besides 的區別：besides 表「另外加上」（累加），而 except/except for 表「排除」（減除）。此句型常用於考試、評論或說明完整性時，強調某個例外改變了整體狀況。

examples.eng: The concert was wonderful, except that the sound system failed once.
examples.chi: 演唱會很精彩，除了音響系統故障了一次。

examples.eng: Everything is ready for the trip except for the plane tickets.
examples.chi: 旅行的一切都準備好了，除了飛機票。

examples.eng: The project would have succeeded except that we ran out of budget.
examples.chi: 這個專案本來會成功，除了我們的預算用完了。

examples.eng: The exam was easy except for the last three questions.
examples.chi: 考試很簡單，除了最後三題。

adj_table_for.zh: 本來會……（與過去事實相反）

extension.tip: 判斷使用 except that 或 except for 的關鍵：看例外部分是否為完整敘述。若是具體事件或動作狀況，用 except that + 子句；若是單純名詞或物品，用 except for + 名詞。except 表減除，beside/besides 表加上，兩者意義相反。

examples.test: The day was perfect __ the rain in the afternoon.
examples.result: → 填 except for（名詞 the rain）；不填 except that（因為主要句無動詞缺失）

examples.test: Everyone passed the test __ John forgot to submit his answer sheet.
examples.result: → 填 except that（後接完整子句 John forgot...）；不填 except for（except for 後無法直接接子句）

examples.test: X: I love this restaurant besides the slow service. / O: I love this restaurant except for the slow service.
examples.result: → 此處應用 except for（排除），不用 besides（besides 會變成「我喜歡這間餐廳，另外還喜歡慢的服務」，邏輯錯誤）

extension.note: except that 連接『動詞片段』，except for 連接『名詞片段』；except 是減除，besides 是加入。

exercises.sentence: The meeting was productive except that we ran out of time.
exercises.translation: 會議很有成效，除了我們時間用完了。

parts: The house is in excellent condition
exercises.sentence: The house is in excellent condition except for a few broken windows.
exercises.translation: 這間房子狀況很好，除了幾扇破窗。

parts: The vacation would have been perfect
my friend got sick halfway through.
exercises.sentence: The vacation would have been perfect except that my friend got sick halfway through.
exercises.translation: 度假本來會完美，除了我朋友到一半時生病了。

parts: All the equipment is working properly
exercises.sentence: All the equipment is working properly except for the printer in the office.
exercises.translation: 所有設備都正常運作，除了辦公室的印表機。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的例外表達方式，完成句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The meal was delicious _______ the dessert was too sweet.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。except that 後接完整子句（主詞 + 動詞），用於說明具體狀況。句子結構為「主餐很好吃，除了甜點太甜這個情況」。A 項 except for 後需接名詞，不能接子句。C 項 besides 表「另外加上」（累加意義），不符合例外排除的邏輯。D 項 except of 用法錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句義選擇適當的例外詞組，表達缺少的物品。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Everything is prepared for the wedding _______ the guest list.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。except for 後接名詞或名詞片語，用於指出特定事物的缺失。「除了賓客名單外，婚禮一切準備就緒」是排除性表達。A 項 besides 表累加，邏輯相反。B 項 except that 後需完整子句，不適用於單一名詞。D 項 except with 用法不當。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別 except that 與 except for 的用法區別，完成複雜句式。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The presentation went smoothly _______ there was a technical glitch halfway through, and _______ that glitch, the audience was completely engaged.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。第一空：except that 引導完整子句「there was a technical glitch halfway through」。第二空：except for 後接名詞 that glitch。句意：「簡報進行順利，除了中途有技術故障，除了那個故障外，聽眾完全投入」。A 項順序相反。C 項都用 except for 導致第一空語法錯誤。D 項 besides 不表例外。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 在複合句中正確運用 except that 與 except for，辨別細微差異。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The research project has achieved all its objectives _______ the funding committee's requirements weren't fully met, and _______ the time constraints, the team still managed to produce comprehensive results.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。第一空：except that 引導完整子句「the funding committee's requirements weren't fully met」，說明具體狀況。第二空：except for 後接名詞片語 the time constraints，指出特定的限制條件。整句邏輯：「研究計畫達成所有目標，除了委員會要求未完全滿足；除了時間限制外，團隊仍產出完整成果」。B 項順序錯誤。C、D 項混淆兩種結構用法。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 除了沒有WiFi之外，這間咖啡廳的環境很舒適。
translation_exercises.answer: The café is comfortable except for the lack of WiFi.
key_points: except for + N (the lack of WiFi)
形容詞 comfortable 描述整體
hints: 提示1：用 except for + 名詞片語來指出單一例外要素
提示2：注意不能用 except that，因為後面只是名詞概念，非完整子句

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這次月考成績還不錯，除了數學考得不理想之外。
translation_exercises.answer: My midterm exam results were quite good except that I didn't do well in mathematics.
key_points: except that + S + V (I didn't do well)
完整子句說明具體狀況
hints: 提示1：用 except that 後接完整子句時，要有主語和動詞
提示2：不能寫 'except for math'，因為要說明的是『表現不佳』這個動作，非單純名詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 除了缺少實踐經驗之外，他在理論知識上已經掌握得很充分了。
translation_exercises.answer: Except for the lack of practical experience, he has mastered the theoretical knowledge quite well.
key_points: except for + 名詞片語 (the lack of practical experience)
hints: 提示1：except for 引導的短語可置於句首，用逗號隔開主句
提示2：注意與 'besides practical experience' 的區別——前者是『排除』缺點，後者是『額外加上』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這份計畫幾乎完美，除了時間規劃太緊張，導致執行部門感到壓力很大。
translation_exercises.answer: The project is almost flawless except that the timeline is too tight, which puts tremendous pressure on the implementation team.
key_points: except that + 完整子句 (the timeline is too tight)
因果連鎖：例外原因引發後果
hints: 提示1：except that 後的子句可帶有因果關係或進一步說明，形成更複雜的邏輯
提示2：易誤用 'except for the tight timeline'——但若要強調『時間緊張導致的具體影響』，需用 except that 搭配完整動作敘述
